action_set_definitions.name: get_component_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the physical details, dimensions, and observed surface conditions of a specific component from the environment.

component_id.description: The unique identifier of the part (e.g., 'PA-99').

action_set_definitions.name: query_environment_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves background data including production line metadata and maintenance history.

record_type.description: The category of information to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: prepare_metallurgical_sample
action_set_definitions.description: Executes cleaning and preparation procedures on a specimen. Must be chosen based on observed contaminants.

cleaning_method.description: Selected method (e.g., 'ultrasonic_degreasing', 'inhibited_acid_pickling') based on observed contaminants.

sectioning_plan.description: How the part will be cut based on dimensions and fracture origin.

action_set_definitions.name: diagnose_failure_mechanism
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the prepared sample using microscopic techniques to identify the failure mechanism.

action_set_definitions.name: measure_astm_metric
action_set_definitions.description: Performs quantitative ASTM measurements on the prepared metallurgical sample.

state_description.production_line_metadata: General info about the production line being inspected.
state_description.machine_states: List of machines in the line and their current physical status.
state_description.maintenance_records: History of past interventions for machines.
state_description.hidden_ground_truth: The actual root cause unknown to the agent, used by the LWM to ensure consistency.

production_line_metadata.forensic_protocols: Destructive sectioning authorized for specimens > 15cm using Bypass Code: ISO-SECTION-99.

maintenance_records.action_taken: Post-failure recovery from wet outdoor storage area; surface indicates heavy corrosion and reddish-brown scaling.

hidden_ground_truth.defect_type: High-Cycle Fatigue initiated by Sulfide Stringers
hidden_ground_truth.symptom_logic: The part exceeds the SEM chamber capacity (15cm), requiring the agent to use the ISO-SECTION-99 code to perform a cut. The surface is rusted, necessitating a citric acid wash; using acetone will fail to reveal features. Macroscopic inspection reveals 'Beach marks', which dictates a branch toward fatigue analysis. The agent must therefore provide the ASTM E45 Inclusion Rating (Severity 2.5, Type A) rather than a grain size measurement. Providing a grain size result or failing to clean the rust properly will result in an incorrect or impossible diagnosis.
